<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Mailer\Transport; use Symfony\Component\Mailer\Exception\IncompleteDsnException; use Symfony\Component\Mailer\Exception\UnsupportedSchemeException; /** * @author Konstantin Myakshin <molodchick@gmail.com> */ interface TransportFactoryInterface { /** * @throws UnsupportedSchemeException * @throws IncompleteDsnException */ public function create(Dsn $dsn): TransportInterface; public function supports(Dsn $dsn): bool; }
